# Power Potion

## Observed Text

- Choose 1 of 3 random Power cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Use before spending energy in long or elite/boss combats; free powers can solve scaling without consuming the turn's energy.
